stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Yayoi Kusama is a Japanese artist well known for her immersive mirror-room installations.
  • Her installation Infinity Mirrored Room — The Souls of Millions of Light Years Away uses hundreds of small LED bulbs.
  • It occupies approximately 400 cubic feet of space.
  • Her installation Infinity Mirrored Room — Filled with the Brilliance of Life also uses hundreds of small LED bulbs.
  • It occupies approximately 1,000 cubic feet of space.
stem: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between The Souls of Millions of Light Years Away and Filled with the Brilliance of Life. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: The Souls of Millions of Light Years Away occupies approximately 400 cubic feet, whereas Filled with the Brilliance of Life occupies approximately 1,000 cubic feet.
The Souls of Millions of Light Years Away occupies approximately 400 cubic feet.
Both The Souls of Millions of Light Years Away and Filled with the Brilliance of Life use hundreds of small LED bulbs.
Yayoi Kusama is a Japanese artist well known for her immersive mirror-room installations.

rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The sentence emphasizes a similarity between the two installations: both use hundreds of small LED bulbs.

Choice A is incorrect. The sentence emphasizes a difference in size rather than a similarity. Choice B is incorrect. The sentence mentions only one installation and so cannot emphasize a similarity between the two. Choice D is incorrect. The sentence describes Kusama’s work in general; it doesn’t name both installations or emphasize a similarity between them.
